message:
Generate all OCSF versions in CI

The landing page references all schema versions, so the build workflow
needs to generate documentation for all versions, not just the latest.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@ jobs:
         run: pnpm generate:claude-plugins
 
       - name: Generate OCSF reference
-        run: pnpm generate:ocsf
+        run: pnpm generate:ocsf:all
 
       - name: Generate docs map
         run: pnpm generate:docs-map
